fab_section_md:
- Son of Aegon I and Rhaenys; reigned 37–42 and was succeeded by his brother Maegor I. (fab-lineages-and-family-tree-25:23)
- Father of Jaehaerys I. (fab-lineages-and-family-tree-25:29)
identity_line: Aenys I — Son of Aegon I and Rhaenys; reigned 37–42 and was succeeded by his brother Maegor I.

fab_section_md:
- The Old King, the Conciliator; Aenys's son; reigned 48–103. (fab-lineages-and-family-tree-25:29)
- Grandfather of Viserys I. (fab-lineages-and-family-tree-25:33)
identity_line: Jaehaerys I — The Old King, the Conciliator; Aenys's son; reigned 48–103.

fab_section_md: - Grandson of Jaehaerys I; reigned 103–129; father of Aegon II. (fab-lineages-and-family-tree-25:33)
identity_line: Viserys I — Grandson of Jaehaerys I; reigned 103–129; father of Aegon II.

fab_section_md: - Eldest son of Viserys I; reigned 129–131. His ascent was disputed by his half-sister Rhaenyra, ten years his elder, and both perished in the war between them that singers called the Dance of the Dragons. (fab-lineages-and-family-tree-25:35)
identity_line: Aegon II — Eldest son of Viserys I; reigned 129–131. His ascent was disputed by his half-sister Rhaenyra, ten years his elder, and both perished in the war between them that singers called the Dance of the Dragons.

fab_section_md: - Half-sister of Aegon II, ten years his elder; she disputed his ascent and both perished in the Dance of the Dragons. Mother of Aegon III. (fab-lineages-and-family-tree-25:35)
identity_line: Rhaenyra — Half-sister of Aegon II, ten years his elder; she disputed his ascent and both perished in the Dance of the Dragons. Mother of Aegon III.

fab_section_md: - The Dragonbane, Rhaenyra's son; reigned 131–157. The last of the Targaryen dragons died during his reign. (fab-lineages-and-family-tree-25:39)
identity_line: Aegon III — The Dragonbane, Rhaenyra's son; reigned 131–157. The last of the Targaryen dragons died during his reign.

fab_section_md: - The Unworthy; eldest son of Viserys II; reigned 172–184. He had nine mistresses. (fab-lineages-and-family-tree-25:55)
identity_line: Aegon IV — The Unworthy; eldest son of Viserys II; reigned 172–184. He had nine mistresses.
